studies.title: A prospective, randomized, group-controlled, unblinded, multicenter pilot study to investigate the eCovery therapy app in patients with non-specific upper back pain

_verification.reason: The study specifically investigates the 'eCovery therapy app', which matches the product name 'eCovery - Therapie bei Schmerzen im unteren Rücken'. The trial registration and full text confirm the use of this app, developed by eCovery GmbH, as the intervention.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a prospective, randomized, group-controlled, unblinded, multicenter pilot study with participants randomly allocated to intervention or control groups, which fits the definition of an RCT.
